name: Reinforced Hull Plating
description: Layers of composite battle-steel welded over the primary hull.
effect: +2 Hull points. The ship counts as one size class larger for ramming purposes.

name: Void Energy Shields
description: Advanced energized barrier system derived from collapsed void particle technology.
effect: +2 Shield points. Shields recharge 1 point per round instead of requiring a full recharge action.

name: Integrated PD Network
description: Ship-wide network of automated point-defense turrets linked to a central targeting AI.
effect: Automatically intercepts the first missile or torpedo attack each round, negating it entirely.

name: Ablative Ceramic Armor
description: Sacrificial ceramic panels that absorb and dissipate kinetic impacts.
effect: Reduce all Kinetic weapon damage taken by 1 (minimum 1). One-time emergency: absorb up to 4 damage from a single hit, then this module is destroyed.

name: Sensor-Absorbent Coating
description: Radar-absorbent polymer surface that scatters active sensor sweeps.
effect: Enemy sensor range against this ship is halved. Long-range weapons targeting this ship suffer -1 to hit.

name: Void Phase Cloak
description: Experimental Syndicate technology that briefly shifts the ship into a parallel void dimension.
effect: Once per game, activate to become untargetable for one full round. Cannot fire weapons while cloaked.

name: Bio-Carapace Regeneration
description: Living hull tissue grown from Chorus biomatter that seals breaches autonomously.
effect: Regenerate 2 Hull points at the start of each round. Hull cannot exceed original maximum from regeneration.

name: Overcharged Ion Engines
description: Factory-tuned ion drives running beyond rated capacity.
effect: +3 Speed. Once per game, boost to +6 Speed for one round (overheats: lose 1 Speed permanently after use).

name: Combat Afterburner
description: Emergency chemical thrust system for emergency evasive maneuvers.
effect: Once per game per activation, move an additional 6" immediately after an enemy fires at this ship. Requires crew rating 2+.

name: Silent Running Drive
description: Dampened emission drive that masks the ship's energy signature during movement.
effect: When this ship moves, it does not trigger overwatch fire. Sensors checks against it are made at -2.

name: Micro-Warp Skimmer
description: Miniaturized warp field generator for short-range dimensional shortcuts.
effect: Once per game, teleport this ship up to 12" to any unoccupied location. Does not trigger overwatch.

name: Advanced Targeting Computer
description: AI-assisted targeting suite that calculates optimal firing solutions in milliseconds.
effect: +1 to all attack rolls. Once per round, re-roll one failed attack die.

name: Integrated Fire Control System
description: Networked weapons control system that links all weapon batteries for coordinated fire.
effect: When firing multiple weapons in the same attack, add +1 to the total damage roll for each additional weapon beyond the first.

name: Onboard Ammo Fabricator
description: Industrial nano-fabricator that replenishes missile and kinetic ammunition mid-battle.
effect: All Limited ammunition weapons gain +2 volleys/salvos. Once per game, fully replenish one weapon's limited ammo.

name: Deep-Range Sensor Array
description: Extended passive and active sensor suite for long-range detection and targeting.
effect: +2 Sensors. This ship can target enemies at double the normal Long range. Reveals stealthed ships within 10".

name: Tactical Command Bridge
description: Expanded command and control facilities allowing real-time fleet coordination.
effect: Friendly ships within 8" may use this ship's Sensors value instead of their own. Once per round, grant one allied ship an additional action.

name: Damage Control Drones
description: Swarm of autonomous micro-drones that continuously repair battle damage.
effect: At the end of your turn, repair 1 Hull damage. Can be used to repair an adjacent allied ship instead (same effect).

name: Emergency Medical Bay
description: Triage facilities for combat casualties.
effect: +1 Crew capacity. Crew lost in combat is recovered on a 4+ roll at the end of each round.

name: Electronic Warfare Suite
description: Powerful ECM and jamming systems that disrupt enemy targeting and communications.
effect: Enemy ships within 6" suffer -1 to all attack rolls. Once per game, completely shut down one enemy ship's shields for 2 rounds.

name: Resonance Field Amplifier
description: Chorus-grown living crystal matrix that amplifies the ship's resonance field.
effect: Extends Resonance Link range to 8". Allied Chorus ships within range gain +1 to all attack rolls and +1 Shield.

name: Bio-Drone Spore Bay
description: Pressurized chambers growing swarms of biological fighter-drones.
effect: Each round, deploy 1d4 Bio-Drones (treat as Interceptor-class, Hull 1, Speed 10, 1d4 attack). Maximum 6 active drones at once.

name: Overcharge Reactor Core
description: A dangerously unstable reactor running at 150% rated output.
effect: All weapon damage rolls add +1 die. If this ship takes a critical hit, roll a d6: on a 1, the reactor goes critical—deal 2d6 to all ships within 4" (including allies).

name: Gravity Anchor System
description: Iron Dominion siege technology that locks a ship in place as an immovable weapons platform.
effect: When deployed (counts as an action), the ship cannot move but gains +2 to all attack rolls and +4 Hull (temporary). Enemy ships within 6" move at half speed.

name: Void Resonance Engine
description: A Syndicate masterpiece engine that partially exists outside normal space.
effect: This ship may move through obstacles and other ships. Weapons targeting this ship have a 20% chance (roll 1-2 on d6) of missing entirely due to partial void-phase.
